{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/svyazi-2-0/architecture/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. architecture

_Файлов:_ 7

h2. Содержание

* [card-envelope.md|card-envelope.md] — 
* [evidence-envelope.md|evidence-envelope.md] — 
* [gaps.md|gaps.md] — > [!TIP]
* [integration-spec.md|integration-spec.md] — > [!TIP]
* [memory-write-policy.md|memory-write-policy.md] — 
* [review-record.md|review-record.md] — 
* [skill-tool-policy.md|skill-tool-policy.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/multi-tier-architecture/README.md] (сходство 0.17)
* [review-record|docs/svyazi-2-0/architecture/review-record.md] (сходство 0.17)
* [README|docs/ai-collaborations/continuation/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
